scope: Primary frame: Sub-Saharan Africa. Country panel: 48 African sovereign states with both 2023 World Bank / ITU internet-use observations and 2023 cable.co.uk 1GB price observations, using Natural Earth admin-0 country polygons projected into scene space with centroid-based marker anchors.

price_context.note: These regional price figures come from cable.co.uk's published 2023 regional averages and should be treated as an absolute-price lens, distinct from ITU and GSMA income-adjusted affordability measures.
